message:
Merge pull request #4 from llm-d/dependabot/github_actions/actions/setup-python-6

deps(actions): bump actions/setup-python from 5 to 6

files.patch:
@@ -81,7 +81,7 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Set up Python
         if: steps.check-python.outputs.has_python == 'true'
-        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
+        uses: actions/setup-python@v6
         with:
           python-version: "3.11"
